title: leonurus bungeanus
intro: Leonurus bungeanus, also known as the Chinese motherwort, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Leonurus bungeanus include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with premenstrual syndrome (PMS). In herbal preparations, Leonurus bungeanus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
